title: Oven Scraper Tool with 5 Replacement Blades, Hob Scraper for Glass Hob Non Scratch, Stainless Steel Ceramic Hob and Oven Cleaning Tool, Safe Blade Scrapers for Grease and Burnt Residue
features: Efficient Kitchen Cleaning Solution: You will receive 1 non-scratch oven scraper tool and 5 replaceable blades, designed to tackle burnt-on food, grease, grime, stickers, and more. This versatile tool is ideal for cleaning ovens, hobs, glass surfaces, and smooth cooktops without causing damage. Whether you’re deep cleaning your kitchen or removing adhesive residue, this scraper tool is your go-to solution for effortless surface maintenance.

Durable Stainless Steel Construction: The scraper tool features a sturdy stainless steel body paired with a comfortable ergonomic handle for secure, slip-free grip. Built for long-term use, it provides excellent strength and corrosion resistance. The replaceable blades slide in easily, ensuring ongoing performance. Designed for both household and commercial use, this tool offers professional-grade quality in a lightweight format.

Scratch-Free Cleaning for Sensitive Surfaces: This oven scraper tool is specially designed to clean delicate surfaces such as ceramic hobs and induction cooktops without leaving scratches. The angled design and fine blade edge enable precise cleaning while protecting your appliances. Ideal for those who want a hygienic clean without abrasive scrubbing, it works well on glass, stainless steel, and enamel surfaces.

Quick Blade Control and Safety Features: The scraper tool includes a sliding mechanism to push the blade out for use and retract it for safe storage when not in use. The push-button locking system enhances control during cleaning, reducing the risk of accidental slips. This makes it an ideal scraper for cleaning in tight spots, around knobs, or near sensitive appliance edges.

Multipurpose Use Across Home Applications: Beyond oven and hob cleaning, this scraper is perfect for removing paint stains, stickers from windows, labels from bottles, or hardened residues from tiles. It functions as a ceramic hob scraper, window scraper, and scraper for cleaning kitchen appliances. Keep it in your tool kit for daily cleaning tasks, DIY repairs, or craft work involving glue and residue removal.
description: Product description This professional-grade oven scraper tool with 5 replacement blades is designed to make kitchen and household cleaning tasks more efficient and less abrasive. Built from high-quality stainless steel, it ensures long-term durability and resistance to corrosion, while the ergonomic handle provides comfort and stability throughout use. Whether you’re cleaning stubborn grease off a ceramic hob or removing sticky labels from glass, this non-scratch scraper gets the job done without damaging the surface. The compact design includes a sliding mechanism that safely stores the blade when not in use, making it a practical and secure addition to any cleaning kit. The included blades are easy to replace, ensuring consistent performance with minimal maintenance. Its precise edge allows effective removal of residue, grime, or cooked-on food with just a few strokes, minimizing the need for harsh chemicals or heavy scrubbing. Compatible with glass, ceramic, and metal surfaces, this scraper is ideal for ovens, induction cooktops, windows, tiles, and more. Whether you need to clean a hob after cooking or scrape off old labels from jars, it’s versatile enough to handle multiple household needs. Suitable for both DIY and professional use, it’s a must-have for kitchens, workshops, and cleaning crews alike. Each pack includes 1 oven and hob scraper tool and 5 sharp replacement blades, offering excellent value and long-term functionality. For best results, always clean the blade after use and keep it retracted during storage. Upgrade your cleaning routine with this efficient, safe, and reliable scraper tool. Ingredients NO
